Legal.name: Cheung, Maria

explanatoryNotes: Public matching funds make up 72% of this campaign's total resources.
Private fundraising looks relatively diffuse: the top ten donors account for only 13% of reported private contributions.
12 donors gave at the legal maximum, totaling $12,600.
A noticeable share of reported private fundraising, 23%, came from outside New York City.
Among reported private contributions, small business / retail stands out as one of the strongest donor patterns.
